problem id: 1fa373db
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00101001 -> 01000010
  00010110 -> 10110101
  10111001 -> 11100110
  01110100 -> 10111101
  11100001 -> 00110000
  00011011 -> 11011110
  01000101 -> 00111001
  01100110 -> 00101001
  00010000 -> 10000100
  11101100 -> 01011011

query: 00100100
predicted answer: 00101001
